titles.title: Jehovah-Jireh My God Shall Supply All My Need

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jehovah-Jireh, my provider His grace is sufficient for me, For me, for me Jehovah-Jireh, my provider His grace is sufficient For me,

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My God shall supply all my needs According to his riches in glory He gave His angels charge over me Jehovah-Jireh, cares for me for me, for me Jehovah-Jireh cares for me
